title: Optical device compensating the imperfections of the optical components composing the device and method of manufacturing such a device
abstract: The invention proposes an optical device for applying a determined transformation to a light radiation, the device comprising a phase manipulating element for spatially modifying the phase of an input light radiation according to a determined phase profile and for forming, through a plurality of transmissions or reflexions, an output light radiation. The device also comprises a plurality of optical components for guiding the propagation of the input light radiation and/or the output light radiation, the plurality of optical components having imperfections. The determined phase profile of the phase manipulating element is configured to impart the determined transformation adjusted to the imperfections of at least one of the plurality of optical components.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A method of manufacturing an optical device for applying a determined transformation to a light radiation, the optical device comprising: - a phase manipulating element (103) for spatially modifying the phase of an input light radiation according to a determined phase profile and for forming, through a plurality of transmissions or reflexions, an output light radiation; - a plurality of optical components (10, 20, 102) for guiding the propagation of the input light radiation and/or the output light radiation; the method successively comprising: - a qualification step to measure at least one characteristic of at least one optical component of the plurality of optical components (10, 20, 102); - a design step to numerically design the determined spatial phase profile of the phase manipulating element (103) taking into account the measurement of the at least one optical component; - a manufacturing step to manufacture the phase manipulating element (103) such that it presents the determined spatial phase profile; and 

 an assembling step to assemble the manufactured phase manipulating element (103) and the optical components (10, 20, 102) to form the optical device. 2. The method of manufacturing according to claim 1, wherein the at least one characteristic comprises a geometric parameter of the optical component. 3. The method of manufacturing according to claim 1 or 2 , wherein the at least one characteristic comprises a parameter (Q) of a light radiation propagated by the component. 4. The method of manufacturing according to claim 3, wherein the parameter (Q) is a parameter of the shape of the light radiation chosen among : - the waist of the light radiation; - the position of the light radiation; - the angle of the light radiation relative to a reference axis ; - the spectrum of the light radiation; - the modal content of the light radiation. 5. The method of manufacturing according to any previous claim wherein the at least one characteristic comprises the description of the light radiation propagated by the component . 6. The method of manufacturing according to any of claims 1 to 5, wherein the plurality of optical components (10, 20, 102) comprises an input stage (10) to inject the input light radiation into the optical device, and the at least one component of the plurality of optical components (10, 20, 102) comprises the input stage (10). 7. The method of manufacturing according to any of claims 1 to 6, wherein the plurality of optical components (10, 20, 102) comprises an output stage (20) to guide the output light radiation, and the at least one component of the plurality of optical components (10, 20, 102) comprises the output stage (20). 8. The method of manufacturing according to any of claims 1 to 7, wherein the plurality of optical components (10, 20, 102) comprises a light source, and the at least one component of the plurality of optical components (10, 20, 102) comprises the light source. 9. The method of manufacturing according to any of claims 1 to 8, the method comprising a positioning step of positioning relatively to each other's at least some of the plurality of optical components (10, 20, 102) to form a sub-assembly, and the at least one component of the plurality of optical components (10, 20, 102) comprises the subassembly. 10. The method of manufacturing according to claim 9, wherein the plurality of optical components (10, 20, 102) comprises a mirror (102) and wherein the sub-assembly comprises the mirror (102) . 11. The method of manufacturing according to claim 9 or 10 previous claims, wherein the positioning step comprises positioning the optical components (10, 20, 102) on a common support ( 110 ) . 12. An optical device for applying a determined transformation to a light radiation, the device comprising: - a phase manipulating element (103) for spatially modifying the phase of an input light radiation according to a determined phase profile and for forming, through a plurality of transmissions or reflexions, an output light radiation; - a plurality of optical components (10, 20, 102) for guiding the propagation of the input light radiation and/or the output light radiation, the plurality of optical components (10, 20, 102) having imperfections; the optical device being characterized in that the determined phase profile of the phase manipulating element (103) is configured according to the method of manufacturing according to any preceding claim. 13. An optical device according to claim 12 wherein the plurality of optical components comprises an input stage (10) for injecting the input light radiation into the optical device. 14. An optical device according to claim 12 or 13 wherein the plurality of optical components comprises an output stage (20) for guiding the output light radiation out of the optical device. 15. An optical device according to any of claims 12 to 14 wherein the plurality of optical components comprises a mirror (102) disposed with respect to the phase manipulating element (103) and form a multi-pass cavity.
